title: 2025-01-XX - Documentation Cleanup Cycle 1
content:

documentation entropy reduction. cycle 1 of systematic cleanup. redundant files identified and eliminated.

[CANON AUTHORITY GRANTED]

This episode establishes binding precedent for documentation cleanup protocols. Future development assumes these consolidation patterns as standard operating procedure.

[SYSTEM STATE]

documentation entropy had accumulated across the codebase.

redundant files and overlapping documentation created maintenance overhead.

system pressure revealed the need for consolidation.

[EXECUTION LOG]

systematic file analysis was applied across all directories.

duplicate and redundant documentation was identified.

single sources of truth were established and maintained.

[ARTIFACTS FORGED]

  • 8 redundant files eliminated
  • Root `PRD.md` maintained as SSOT for Product Requirements
  • `SOLOMON_BOSS_BATTLE_README.md` maintained as SSOT for Solomon boss system
  • `docs/solomon_boss_consolidation.md` maintained (consolidation plan, different purpose)

[OPEN LOOPS IDENTIFIED]

cleanup cycle 2 targets identified.
